---
title: "CLI Overview — Data Profile"
subtitle: "Subset: 3 CLI sources (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI)"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| code-summary: "Setup — paths, DuckDB connection, helpers"

import sys
from pathlib import Path

_this = Path.cwd()
_project_root = _this if (_this / "src").exists() else _this.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))

import pandas as pd
import duckdb
from itables import init_notebook_mode
init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=False)

from src.parsers.quarto_helpers import (
    fmt_pct, fmt_int, safe_int, show_df, show_md, plotly_bar,
    has_col, has_view, table_count, setup_unified_views,
)

SUBSET_TITLE     = "CLI (3 local sources)"
SOURCES_FILTER   = ["claude_code", "codex", "gemini_cli"]
UNIFIED_DIR      = _project_root / "data" / "unified"
MUTED            = "#D1D5DB"

SOURCE_COLORS = {
    "claude_code": "#7C3AED",
    "codex":       "#374151",
    "gemini_cli":  "#1A56DB",
}

con = duckdb.connect()
_setup = setup_unified_views(con, UNIFIED_DIR, sources_filter=SOURCES_FILTER)
```

{{< include _template_overview.qmd >}}
